title: Confetti
description: A visual effect component that renders celebratory confetti animation, often used for success messages or festive interactions.
summary: A fun and engaging animation component that displays confetti for celebration or reward effects.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Confetti` works.

<ConfettiDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Confetti` component.

<ConfettiDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Props API

| Props API   | Type     | Default | Annotation |
| ----------- | -------- | ------- | ---------- |
| lifeTime`?` | `number` | `-`     |            |
| lifespan`?` | `number` | `3500`  |            |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

`,(0,n.jsx)(i,{name:"confetti",code:`"use client";\r
import { forwardRef } from "react";\r
import { mergeRefs } from "@/hooks/use-merged-ref";\r
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
const DEFAULT_COLORS = ["#f44336", "#e91e63", "#9c27b0", "#673ab7", "#3f51b5", "#2196f3", "#03a9f4", "#00bcd4", "#009688", "#4CAF50", "#8BC34A", "#CDDC39", "#FFEB3B", "#FFC107", "#FF9800", "#FF5722"];\r
\r
interface Vector {\r
  x: number;\r
  y: number;\r
}\r
\r
interface Born {\r
  span: number;\r
  time: number;\r
}\r
\r
interface ParticleProps {\r
  position: Vector;\r
  velocity: Vector;\r
  gravity: Vector;\r
  friction: number;\r
  size: number;\r
  shape: number;\r
  color: string;\r
  // ...\r
  opacity: number;\r
  lifespan: number;\r
  lifeTime: number;\r
  bornTime: Born;\r
}\r
\r
class Particle {\r
  position: Vector;\r
  velocity: Vector;\r
  gravity: Vector;\r
  friction: number;\r
  size: number;\r
  shape: number;\r
  color: string;\r
  // ...\r
  opacity: number;\r
  bornTime: Born;\r
  lifespan: number;\r
  lifeTime: number;\r
\r
  constructor(parent: ParticleProps) {\r
    this.position = { ...parent.position };\r
    this.velocity = { ...parent.velocity };\r
    this.gravity = { ...parent.gravity };\r
    this.friction = parent.friction;\r
    this.size = parent.size;\r
    this.shape = parent.shape;\r
    this.color = parent.color;\r
    this.bornTime = { ...parent.bornTime };\r
    // ...\r
    this.opacity = 1;\r
    this.bornTime.span = Date.now();\r
    this.lifespan = parent.lifespan;\r
    this.lifeTime = parent.lifeTime;\r
  }\r
\r
  reset() {\r
    this.bornTime.time = Date.now();\r
    this.position.y = -Math.random() * 80;\r
    this.position.x = Math.random() * window.innerWidth;\r
    this.velocity = { x: Math.random() * 6 - 3, y: Math.random() * 8 - 10 };\r
  }\r
\r
  draw(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {\r
    const currentTime = Date.now();\r
    const age = currentTime - this.bornTime.span;\r
\r
    // Calculates opacity based on age\r
    if (age < this.lifespan) {\r
      this.opacity = 1 - age / this.lifespan;\r
    } else {\r
      this.opacity = 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    ctx.save();\r
    ctx.globalAlpha = this.opacity;\r
\r
    ctx.translate(this.position.x, this.position.y);\r
    ctx.rotate(this.velocity.x * 0.2);\r
    ctx.scale(1, Math.sin(this.velocity.y * 0.2));\r
    ctx.fillStyle = this.color;\r
\r
    if (this.shape === 0) {\r
      ctx.fillRect(-this.size / 2, -this.size / 2, this.size, this.size);\r
    } else {\r
      ctx.beginPath();\r
      ctx.ellipse(0, 0, this.size / 2, this.size / 2, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);\r
      ctx.fill();\r
    }\r
\r
    ctx.restore();\r
  }\r
\r
  integrate() {\r
    // Manual implementation of vector operations\r
    this.velocity.x += this.gravity.x;\r
    this.velocity.y += this.gravity.y;\r
    // set the slope\r
    // this.velocity.x += Math.cos(this.velocity.y * 0.1) * 0.05;\r
    this.velocity.x *= this.friction;\r
    this.velocity.y *= this.friction;\r
    this.position.x += this.velocity.x;\r
    this.position.y += this.velocity.y;\r
\r
    if (this.position.y > window.innerHeight || this.position.x < 0 || this.position.x > window.innerWidth + 10) {\r
      this.reset();\r
    }\r
\r
    if (Date.now() - this.bornTime.span > this.lifeTime) {\r
      this.reset();\r
    }\r
  }\r
\r
  render(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {\r
    this.integrate();\r
    this.draw(ctx);\r
    const lifeRatio = Math.min(1, (Date.now() - this.bornTime.span) / this.lifeTime);\r
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1 - lifeRatio;\r
    // ...\r
    ctx.restore();\r
    // return to normal alpha\r
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
interface ParticleSystemProps {\r
  maxParticles: number;\r
  gravity: { x: number; y: number };\r
  lifespan: number;\r
  lifeTime: number;\r
  colors?: string[];\r
}\r
\r
class ParticleSystem {\r
  gravity: { x: number; y: number };\r
  friction: number;\r
  particles: Particle[];\r
  // ...\r
  lifespan: number;\r
  lifeTime: number;\r
\r
  constructor({ maxParticles, gravity, lifespan, lifeTime, colors = DEFAULT_COLORS }: ParticleSystemProps) {\r
    // ...\r
    this.lifespan = lifespan;\r
    this.lifeTime = lifeTime;\r
    this.gravity = { ...gravity };\r
    this.friction = 0.98;\r
    this.particles = Array.from({ length: maxParticles }, () => {\r
      return new Particle({\r
        position: {\r
          x: Math.random() * window.innerWidth,\r
          y: -Math.random() * 80\r
        },\r
        velocity: { x: Math.random() * 6 - 3, y: Math.random() * 8 - 10 },\r
        gravity: this.gravity,\r
        // translate3D shape\r
        // friction: this.friction,\r
        // translate3D shape\r
        friction: Math.round(Math.random()),\r
        size: Math.round(Math.random() * 10 + 5),\r
        shape: Math.round(Math.random()),\r
        color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],\r
        bornTime: { span: 1, time: Date.now() },\r
        lifespan: this.lifespan,\r
        lifeTime: this.lifeTime,\r
        opacity: 1\r
      });\r
    });\r
  }\r
\r
  render(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {\r
    this.particles.forEach(particle => particle.render(ctx));\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
interface CanvasDimensionsProps {\r
  width: number;\r
  height: number;\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseConfettiProps {\r
  lifespan?: number;\r
  lifeTime?: number;\r
  colors?: string[];\r
}\r
\r
type Object = { [key: string]: string };\r
function styles(): Object {\r
  const vars: Object = {};\r
  vars.display = "block";\r
  vars.background = "none transparent";\r
  vars.height = "100vh";\r
  vars.width = "100%";\r
  vars.zIndex = "9999";\r
  vars.top = "0px";\r
  vars.right = "0px";\r
  vars.bottom = "0px";\r
  vars.left = "0px";\r
  return vars;\r
}\r
\r
export function useConfetti({ lifespan = 3500, lifeTime, colors }: UseConfettiProps) {\r
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);\r
  const [isNull, setIsNull] = useState(false);\r
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);\r
  const [ctx, setCtx] = useState<CanvasRenderingContext2D | null>(null);\r
  const [canvasDimensions, setCanvasDimensions] = useState<CanvasDimensionsProps>({ width: 0, height: 0 });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => setMounted(true), []);\r
\r
  const Timer = lifeTime || lifespan + 500;\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (!mounted) return;\r
\r
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\r
    if (canvas) {\r
      const context = canvas.getContext("2d");\r
      setCtx(context);\r
      setCanvasDimensions({\r
        width: window.innerWidth,\r
        height: window.innerHeight\r
      });\r
    }\r
\r
    const handleResize = () => {\r
      setCanvasDimensions({\r
        width: window.innerWidth,\r
        height: window.innerHeight\r
      });\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("resize", handleResize);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("resize", handleResize);\r
    };\r
  }, [mounted]);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (!mounted) return;\r
    const cleanupTimeout = setTimeout(() => setIsNull(true), Timer);\r
    return () => clearTimeout(cleanupTimeout);\r
  }, [Timer, mounted]);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (!ctx || !mounted) return;\r
\r
    const confetti = new ParticleSystem({\r
      maxParticles: 500,\r
      gravity: { x: 0, y: 0.15 },\r
      lifespan,\r
      lifeTime: Timer,\r
      colors\r
    });\r
    const animate = () => {\r
      if (ctx) {\r
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvasDimensions.width, canvasDimensions.height);\r
        confetti.render(ctx);\r
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    animate();\r
  }, [ctx, lifespan, Timer, canvasDimensions, mounted, colors]);\r
\r
  return {\r
    canvasRef,\r
    styles,\r
    rendering: !mounted || isNull,\r
    width: canvasDimensions.width,\r
    height: canvasDimensions.height\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export interface ConfettiProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"canvas">, UseConfettiProps {\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & Record<string, any>;\r
}\r
export const Confetti = forwardRef<HTMLCanvasElement, ConfettiProps>(({ lifeTime, lifespan, style, colors, ...props }, ref) => {\r
  const { rendering, canvasRef, width, height, styles } = useConfetti({ lifeTime, lifespan, colors });\r
\r
  const windowIsDefine = typeof window !== "undefined" && typeof document !== "undefined";\r
  if (!windowIsDefine || rendering) return null;\r
\r
  return <canvas {...{ ref: mergeRefs(canvasRef, ref), width, height, style: { ...styles(), ...style }, ...props }} />;\r
});\r
Confetti.displayName = "Confetti";`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/components/confetti.tsx"})]})}function f(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(d,{...r})}):d(r)}function a(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return b(k);})();
;return Component;
